introSection: Fruitworm Pulley (Chinese: 果虫滑车) was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hangzhou Children's Park in Xihu, Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China. It was manufactured by Jinma Rides and had orange track and green supports. The train was a caterpillar that goes through a giant apple.
fullText: Fruitworm Pulley (Chinese: 果虫滑车) was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hangzhou Children's Park in Xihu, Hangzhou, Zhejiang, China. It was manufactured by Jinma Rides and had orange track and green supports. The train was a caterpillar that goes through a giant apple.
